response.overview: On the occasion of Ambedkar Jayanthi, we're proud to release our short film Babasaheb in Bengaluru — a reflection on the living legacy of Dr. B.R. Ambedkar through the many statues that stand across the city of Bengaluru.  These aren’t government-funded monuments.  They’re people’s statues — built by communities from the ground up.  Each one is an act of love, memory, and resistance.  💬 Educate. Agitate. Organise.  This is more than a slogan. It’s the soul of this film.
response.title: Babasaheb In Bengaluru
